description: One row per monthly report. Stores report HTML and metadata. Retention: Indefinite.

columns.name: total_conversations
columns.note: Total conversations analyzed in the month

columns.name: satisfaction_rate
columns.note: Average satisfaction rate for the month (0-100)

columns.name: top_issues
columns.note: JSON array of top 10 issue categories with counts

columns.name: accuracy_rate
columns.note: Average AI accuracy rate for the month (0-1)

columns.name: status
columns.note: draft | approved (human sets to approved after review)

notes: Status starts as 'draft'. QA Manager updates to 'approved' after human review before wider distribution.
